Title: Test Initial Configuration Flow
Test Data: User chooses to start a new configuration
Test Steps:
1. User launches the application.
2. The application starts in the Initial Configuration state.
3. User chooses to start a new configuration.
Expected Result: The application proceeds to the Add Vehicle state.

Title: Test Configuration Existence Flow
Preconditions: Application is launched and a configuration already exists
Test Data: User chooses not to start a new configuration
Test Steps:
1. User launches the application.
2. The application starts in the Initial Configuration state.
3. User chooses not to start a new configuration.
Expected Result: The application proceeds to the Access List of Distributors state.

Title: Test Manual Vehicle Addition Flow
Preconditions: Application is launched and a new configuration is started
Test Data: User chooses to add a vehicle manually
Test Steps:
1. User launches the application.
2. The application starts in the Initial Configuration state.
3. User chooses to start a new configuration.
4. User chooses to add a vehicle manually.
Expected Result: The application proceeds to the Add Vehicle state.

Title: Test Vehicle Selection and Addition Flow
Preconditions: Application is launched and a new configuration is started
Test Data: User chooses to select a vehicle from the list
Test Steps:
1. User launches the application.
2. The application starts in the Initial Configuration state.
3. User chooses to start a new configuration.
4. User chooses to select a vehicle from the list.
Expected Result: The application proceeds to the Add Vehicle state with the selected vehicle.

Title: Test No More Vehicle Addition Flow
Preconditions: Application is launched and a new configuration is started with at least one vehicle
Test Data: User chooses not to add another vehicle
Test Steps:
1. User launches the application.
2. The application starts in the Initial Configuration state.
3. User chooses to start a new configuration.
4. User adds at least one vehicle.
5. User chooses not to add another vehicle.
Expected Result: The application proceeds to the Initial Configuration state.

Title: Test Accessing the Website
Preconditions: User has access to the application
Test Steps:
1. User accesses the application.
2. The application navigates to the website.
Expected Result: The user is able to access the website.

Title: Test Displaying Distributor List
Preconditions: User has accessed the website and distributors are available
Test Steps:
1. User accesses the website.
2. The application navigates to the distributor list.
Expected Result: The user is able to see the list of available distributors.

Title: Test Displaying Unavailable Distributor List
Preconditions: User has accessed the website and distributors are not available
Test Steps:
1. User accesses the website.
2. The application navigates to the distributor list.
Expected Result: The user is able to see the list of unavailable distributors.

Title: Test Viewing Distributor Details
Preconditions: User has accessed the website and a distributor is available
Test Steps:
1. User accesses the website.
2. The application navigates to the distributor list.
3. User selects a distributor.
4. The application navigates to the distributor details.
Expected Result: The user is able to see the details of the selected distributor.

Title: Test Canceling Distributor Details
Module: Annullare apertura finestra applicativa del dettaglio del distributore Activity
Preconditions: User has accessed the website and a distributor is available
Test Steps:
1. User accesses the website.
2. The application navigates to the distributor list.
3. User selects a distributor.
4. The application navigates to the distributor details.
5. User chooses to cancel the opening of the distributor detail window.
Expected Result: The distributor detail window is closed.

Title: Test Accessing the Settings Page
Test Steps:
1. User accesses the application.
2. The application navigates to the settings page.
Expected Result: The user is able to access the settings page.

Title: Test Evaluating Settings
Preconditions: User has accessed the settings page
Test Steps:
1. User accesses the settings page.
2. User chooses to evaluate settings.
Expected Result: The user is able to evaluate the settings.

Title: Test Viewing Distributor Data
Module: Mostra i dati dei distributori State
Preconditions: User has accessed the settings page and chosen to evaluate settings
Test Steps:
1. User accesses the settings page.
2. User chooses to evaluate settings.
3. The application navigates to the distributor data.
Expected Result: The user is able to see the distributor data.

Title: Test Viewing Statistic Data
Preconditions: User has accessed the settings page and chosen to evaluate settings
Test Steps:
1. User accesses the settings page.
2. User chooses to evaluate settings.
3. The application navigates to the statistic data.
Expected Result: The user is able to see the statistic data.

Title: Test Adding Vehicle List
Preconditions: User has accessed the settings page and chosen to evaluate settings
Test Data: User chooses to add a vehicle list
Test Steps:
1. User accesses the settings page.
2. User chooses to evaluate settings.
3. The application navigates to the vehicle list addition.
4. User adds a vehicle list.
Expected Result: The user is able to add a vehicle list.

Title: Test Viewing Completed Actions Popup
Module: Visualizza popup con informazioni effettuate State
Preconditions: User has accessed the settings page, chosen to evaluate settings, and added a vehicle list
Test Steps:
1. User accesses the settings page.
2. User chooses to evaluate settings.
3. The application navigates to the vehicle list addition.
4. User adds a vehicle list.
5. The application navigates to the completed actions popup.
Expected Result: The user is able to see the completed actions popup.
